case_title: MIHAELA PUCKO VS. REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PUCKO, MIHAELA AS TO DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUCKO, MIHAELA AS TO DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MIHAELA PUCKO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BONNIE FISHER, AREA VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-19-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC
